global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting trending content with a call to action.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and several circles in a lighter shade, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: A slightly transparent square overlaying the geometric shapes, adding depth.

elements.label: Small text
elements.description: A small text box with minimal content, positioned towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Additional small text
elements.description: Another small text element, positioned slightly above the previous one.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: A small logo with the text 'MoonScreen' in a modern font, located at the top left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Order now' in white, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the main subject shapes behind it, and the CTA at the bottom.
